heritage.title: At LA ROCCA, we bring 18 years of Italian coffee expertise directly to your business.
heritage.subheading: We import and distribute the finest Italian and Mediterranean products.
heritage.description:
Our warehouse in Italy sources only the finest premium coffees for wholesale partners worldwide.

Trusted by cafes, restaurants, and businesses across North America and Europe.

coffeePage.title: Discover our curated selection of premium Italian coffee blends.
coffeePage.subtitle:
From single-origin espresso to specialty blends, each product is sourced directly from Italy's finest roasters and suppliers.

Premium Quality. Wholesale Pricing. Reliable Supply.

productsPage.title: Everything you need for your business.
productsPage.subtitle: Coffee, espresso machines, accessories, and premium Italian food products. Browse our full collection and connect with our team for custom quotes and bulk pricing.

cataloguePage.title: Exclusive Wholesale Collection.
cataloguePage.subtitle: Browse our premium selection available for bulk ordering. Contact us for pricing and distribution details.

legacyPage.title: ABOUT US
legacyPage.description1:
Our founder Claudio La Rocca started as an owner and chef in the 80s of various restaurants, bringing traditional meals to the tables. Now we would like to bring the products that remind you of those flavors to your favorite restaurants here in South Florida.

Founded in 2006, LA ROCCA emerged from a passion for authentic Italian coffee culture. What started as a small operation has grown into a trusted wholesale supplier serving hundreds of businesses globally.
legacyPage.description2: Every product we offer represents our commitment to bringing genuine Italian excellence to your business.

footer.newsletter: Join our newsletter for exclusive offers.

products.name: Espresso Roma
products.description: A full-bodied blend with notes of dark chocolate and toasted caramel. Perfect for traditional Italian espresso.

products.name: Venezia Gold
products.description: Smooth and aromatic 100% Arabica blend. Delicate floral notes with a honey finish.

products.name: Napoli Intenso
products.description: Strong, distinctive Robusta blend. Thick crema and intense caffeine kick.

products.name: La Marzocco Linea PB
products.description: The industry standard for high-volume cafes. Dual boiler system with saturated groups for thermal stability.

products.name: Rocket R9 One
products.description: Pressure profiling capabilities in a commercial-grade package. Hand-built in Milan.

features.title: Artisanal Roasting
features.description: Slow-roasted in small batches in Italy.
